app.name: cannafriend
app.installPWADesc: Install Cannafriend on your device for quick access

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.introDesc: Cannafriend is an app for tracking cannabis cultivation, consumption, and related routines. This policy is drafted primarily with reference to Argentine law and explains what data we process, why we use it, and what rights you have.
privacy.collectionDesc: We collect the data we need to provide the app and the information you choose to add voluntarily. This may include:

data.account: Account data: email, authentication identifiers (via Firebase Authentication).
data.profile: Profile preferences such as language and timezone, together with configuration options you choose inside the app.
data.content: Content you add: plants, journals, nutrients, reminders, stash items and related notes.
data.images: Images you upload (stored in Firebase Storage).
data.device: Technical data: device/browser type and usage needed to operate and secure the app.
data.notifications: Push notification tokens and preferences if you choose to enable them.
data.analytics: Technical events and aggregated or pseudonymized usage data used to measure performance, errors, and app or website usage.
data.payments: Subscription metadata handled by payment processors (Stripe/MercadoPago). We do not store full payment details.
data.storage: Local storage/PWA caches on your device for offline functionality.

sensitive.title: Sensitive data and use caution
sensitive.desc: We do not request sensitive data as a condition of using the service. However, some information you choose to upload, such as consumption habits, personal notes, images, or references to health or treatments, may be considered sensitive or especially private. We recommend sharing only what is strictly necessary.

usageItems.provide: Provide and maintain the service (sync, storage, login).
usageItems.support: Provide support and respond to requests.
usageItems.security: Protect against fraud, abuse, and technical issues.
usageItems.comms: Send service-related communications (e.g., subscription or critical notices).
usageItems.billing: Manage sign-ups, renewals, cancellations, and premium status verification.
usageItems.ads: Record consent and, if you allow it, load advertising or ad measurement on the public website.

legalBases.title: Basis for processing and consent
legalBases.desc: We process your data mainly to deliver the service you request, with your consent where appropriate, for legitimate interests related to security and product improvement, and to comply with legal obligations. If GDPR, UK GDPR, or similar rules also apply to you, these categories may function as legal bases under those regimes as well.
legalBases.contract: Providing the service, managing your account, and syncing the information you choose to store.
legalBases.consent: Consent for push notifications, non-essential cookies or technologies, and optional features.
legalBases.legitInterest: Security, fraud prevention, technical diagnostics, stability improvements, and complaint handling.
legalBases.legalObligation: Limited retention or disclosure when required by law or a valid legal request.

privacy.sharingDesc: We do not sell your personal data. We share limited information with providers that help us operate the app or website:

thirdParties.firebase: Firebase (Authentication, Firestore, Storage) to sign in, store your data, and host content.
thirdParties.google: Google, including Google Sign-In and other Google services integrated into the app or website.
thirdParties.payments: Payment processors (Stripe, MercadoPago) for subscriptions, charges, validation, and payment status management. Their own policies apply.
thirdParties.ai: AI providers (currently Google Gemini and OpenAI) when you use assistant features.
thirdParties.analytics: Measurement and analytics services, such as @vercel/analytics and Firebase Analytics, to understand performance and usage.
thirdParties.ads: Google AdSense and related technologies on the public site, only if you provide the applicable consent.

internationalTransfers.title: International transfers
internationalTransfers.desc: Some of the infrastructure we use may process or store data outside Argentina, including in countries with different data protection standards. When that happens, we rely on the contractual, technical, and organizational measures offered by those providers and limit the scope of shared information to what is necessary for the relevant purpose.

privacy.securityDesc: We apply reasonable technical and organizational security measures, including access controls, authentication, Firebase infrastructure rules, and error review practices. Even so, no system is completely invulnerable and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.cookiesDesc: We use cookies, browser local storage, and PWA caches to keep you signed in, remember preferences, record consent choices, and enable technical app and site functionality.

cookiesItems.auth: Authentication tokens to maintain your session.
cookiesItems.prefs: Preferences such as language, theme, and other in-app configuration choices.
cookiesItems.consent: Local record of your choice about cookies, measurement, or advertising on the public site.
cookiesItems.analytics: Measurement or advertising tools that are activated only when appropriate based on your consent.
cookiesItems.pwa: Offline caches for faster loading and limited offline functionality.

push.title: Push notifications
push.desc: If you enable them, we may send reminders, alerts, or service notices. You can disable them in your device or browser settings.

ai.title: AI features
ai.desc: When you use the assistant, your prompts, messages, and some context needed to answer may be sent to AI providers such as Google Gemini or OpenAI. Those responses may be inaccurate or outdated. Avoid sharing sensitive personal, medical, legal, or financial data.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.desc: We retain your data while your account remains active or while it is needed for the purpose for which it was collected. Some technical logs, backups, security events, or records linked to payments may be retained for additional periods when required for audit, fraud prevention, or legal compliance.

privacy.advertisingDesc: The public website may load Google AdSense and related technologies only after you accept the relevant consent choice. If you do not accept it, that advertising script should not be activated from the landing page.
privacy.rightsDesc: If you are in Argentina, Law 25,326 and the competent supervisory authority recognize, among others, the following rights. If other privacy laws also apply to you, you may have additional rights:

rightsList.info: Be informed about what data we process, for what purpose, and who is responsible for that processing.
rightsList.access: Access the data we hold about you.
rightsList.update: Request updates or deletion where appropriate.
rightsList.delete: Ask for deletion when there is no legal duty to keep the data.
rightsList.withdrawConsent: Withdraw consent given for optional processing, without retroactive effect.
rightsList.complaint: File a complaint with the Agencia de Acceso a la Información Pública (AAIP) or bring a habeas data action if you believe your rights were infringed.

argentina.title: Argentine legal framework
argentina.desc: This policy primarily relies on Argentine Personal Data Protection Law 25,326, its implementing rules, and guidance from the Agencia de Acceso a la Información Pública (AAIP). As a general rule, an access request should be answered within 10 calendar days, and a rectification, update, or deletion request within 5 business days. If our response is insufficient or absent, you may file a complaint with the AAIP or pursue a judicial habeas data action.

children.title: Children and age limits
children.desc: This app is intended only for individuals who are legally old enough to consume or cultivate cannabis under their jurisdiction. We do not knowingly seek to collect data from children.

privacy.changesDesc: We may update this policy to reflect legal, operational, or product changes. If the change is material, we will publish the new effective date and, where appropriate, notify you through reasonable in-app or site methods.
privacy.contactDesc: For questions or to request access, rectification, deletion, or withdrawal of consent, email

terms.title: Terms
terms.acceptanceDesc: By using Cannafriend, you agree to these Terms and the Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.useDesc: You must use the app lawfully, responsibly, and consistently with its purpose. You may not interfere with other users, attempt to access non-public areas, bypass technical controls, or violate applicable laws.

prohibited.illegal: Do not use the app for prohibited activities, to evade regulatory controls, or for unlawful content. You must comply with the cannabis laws that apply to you.
prohibited.abuse: No harassment, spam, or abusive behavior.
prohibited.security: No attempts to breach, probe, or scan the service or related systems.
prohibited.scraping: No automated scraping without prior written consent.

eligibility.title: Eligibility and legal compliance
eligibility.desc: You must meet the legal age required by your jurisdiction and be permitted by applicable law to cultivate, possess, or consume cannabis, where relevant. You are solely responsible for verifying and complying with the laws of the place where you live or use the app.

medical.title: No medical or legal advice
medical.desc: Information available in the app, including AI-generated responses, is for informational purposes only. It is not medical, legal, pharmaceutical, therapeutic, tax, or any other professional advice. Always consult licensed professionals.

emergency.title: Not for emergencies
emergency.desc: Cannafriend is not an emergency, clinical monitoring, or crisis-response service. You must not rely on it as a substitute for immediate medical, toxicological, psychological, legal, or safety assistance.

ai.title: AI-generated outputs
ai.desc: Assistant responses may be inaccurate, incomplete, biased, or outdated. You must critically review any suggestion before acting on it. We do not guarantee that AI outputs are correct, safe, or suitable for your circumstances.

terms.accountDesc: You are responsible for keeping your access credentials confidential, providing reasonably accurate information, and all activity carried out through your account. You must notify us if you detect unauthorized use.

userContent.title: Your content
userContent.desc: You retain ownership of the content you upload, such as plants, logs, images, stash items, or notes. You represent that you have the right to upload it and that it does not violate third-party rights or the law. You grant us a limited license to host, store, process, and display it only to the extent necessary to operate, protect, and improve the service.

subscriptions.title: Premium subscriptions and payments
subscriptions.desc: Premium features may be offered through payments or recurring subscriptions processed by third parties, currently Stripe and MercadoPago. Amounts, renewals, cancellations, taxes, additional charges, and any refunds are governed by the information shown at checkout, the processor's terms, and applicable law. We may suspend premium features in cases of non-payment, fraud, or abusive use.

terms.privacyDesc: See our Privacy Policy for details about how we collect and use data.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.desc: The app, logos, and content (other than your content) are owned by us or our licensors and are protected by law.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers
disclaimers.desc: The service is provided “as is” and “as available”, without warranties of continuous availability, error-free operation, result accuracy, or fitness for a particular purpose. You use the app at your own risk.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.desc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, punitive, or consequential damages arising from the use of, or inability to use, the app. This limitation is not intended to exclude liability where mandatory law does not allow it.

localLaw.title: Applicable law and non-waivable rights
localLaw.desc: These Terms are drafted primarily with Argentine law in mind. If mandatory law in your place of residence, or consumer protection law, grants you rights that cannot be waived or limited, those rights will prevail to the extent required by that law.

terms.terminationDesc: We may suspend or terminate access if you violate these Terms or misuse the service.
terms.changesDesc: We may update these Terms due to legal, operational, or product changes. If you continue using the service after the updated version becomes effective, you will be deemed to accept the new Terms to the extent permitted by law.

landing.hero: Your Complete Cannabis Growing Companion - Track, manage, and optimize your plants with powerful tools designed specifically for cannabis cultivation.
landing.whyChooseDesc: The most complete and easy-to-use growing tool

benefits.easyToUseDesc: Intuitive interface for growers of all levels
benefits.completelyPrivateDesc: Your data stays secure and private
benefits.betterResultsDesc: Optimize your grow with accurate data

imageUpload.orClick: Or use the Add Photo button

updates.title: Update available
updates.description: A new version is ready. We're refreshing automatically to bring you the latest experience.

settings.title: Settings
settings.accountDesc: Manage your account information and session
settings.accountDeletedDesc: Your account and data were removed
settings.deleteAccountError: Error deleting account, please try again
settings.reauthError: You need to sign in again to delete your account

pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications
pushNotifications.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
pushNotifications.enabled: Enabled - You'll receive plant care reminders
pushNotifications.blocked: Blocked - Please enable in browser settings
pushNotifications.blockedDesc: Please enable notifications in your browser settings and refresh the page.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing to browse, you accept their use.

premium.title: Premium required
premium.analyzeDesc: This feature requires a premium subscription. Upgrade your account to access the AI assistant.
premium.mercadoPago: We are working on MercadoPago integration to offer you the best payment experience.

subscription.title: Premium Subscription
subscription.cancelDesc: Cancel your premium subscription. You will lose access to premium features immediately.
subscription.confirmCancelDesc: This action will cancel your premium subscription. You won't be able to access premium features.
subscription.cancelledDesc: Your premium subscription has been cancelled successfully
subscription.alreadyCancelled: You don't have an active subscription to cancel
subscription.mercadopagoNote: For MercadoPago subscriptions, you can also cancel from your MercadoPago account
subscription.manageInApp: You can manage cancellation from this app when the payment provider supports it.
